description:
Ekti Margaret Cardinal is a respected Indigenous Knowledge Keeper from Saddle Lake First Nation, devoted to preserving and sharing the teachings of traditional Cree culture. Known for her exceptional craftsmanship as a Tipi and Tent Maker, Ekti carries the wisdom of her ancestors with deep reverence. She is also the longest-serving member of the Regional Environmental Action Committee (REAC), having held this role since 1990.

Join us again this year as the Edmonton Folk Music Festival continues to work with members of Edmonton’s Indigenous Arts Community to present First Nations, Métis and Inuit artists on our stages. We acknowledge that the EFMF takes place on Treaty 6 traditional lands, the home of the Cree, Dene, Blackfoot, Saulteaux, Nakota Sioux and Metis peoples. We look forward to growing our relationship with Indigenous peoples and communities in the coming years, and we invite you to join us as we walk this journey of reconciliation together.
title: Ekti Margaret Cardinal (Nikamowin)
